name: Ganesh Kalal (MIEAust)
tagline: Civil & Telecom Infrastructure | Major Project Delivery
kicker: Melbourne VIC • Telecom • Infrastructure • QA Compliance
heroTitle: Specializing in 5G network upgrades, land access coordination, and structural delivery.
heroSubtitle: Civil and Telecom Project Engineer with 5+ years of experience across Tier-1/Tier-2 environments. Proven expertise in managing complex stakeholder environments, statutory approvals, and end-to-end commercial execution.
signatureLine: Precision Planning. Rigorous Quality. Reliable Delivery.
aboutLead: A strategy-driven engineer balancing technical oversight with commercial discipline.
aboutStory: Based in Melbourne, I lead major telecommunications upgrades and civil infrastructure packages. I bridge the gap between structural engineering theory and site execution, specializing in 5G infrastructure, statutory approvals, and strict conformance reporting.
knownFor: Fibre Backhaul, Trenching & Civil Works Coordination
tools: Management: MS Project, P6, Procore, InEight
Analysis: SpaceGass, Microstran, MS Tower, RAPT

projects.title: National 5G Telecom Upgrade
projects.preview: Led structural design coordination for 150+ tower upgrades and completed 100+ site inspections.
projects.fullText: Delivered design coordination, structural analysis, field inspections, and approvals support for critical telecom infrastructure across multiple council jurisdictions.
bullets: Delivered 150+ lattice tower and steel/timber pole upgrades.
Managed trenching interfaces, pit-and-pipe readiness and civil coordination for fibre backhaul.
Prepared BoQ/BOM, supported procurement and fabrication reviews.
Secured statutory planning approvals from 20+ councils.

projects.title: Tier-1 Industrial Closures
projects.preview: Project Engineer contributing to full lifecycle delivery of large-scale brownfield infrastructure and remediation projects.
projects.fullText: End-to-end commercial and delivery oversight in live operational and remote environments (ExxonMobil & Rio Tinto), coordinating multi-disciplinary stakeholders.
bullets: Managed subcontractor packages, procurement processes, and regulatory interfaces.
Negotiated and justified contract variations totaling $8M+.
Updated Primavera P6 schedules to reflect sequencing, progress and delay impacts.
Maintained stringent safety and environmental standards in high-risk zones.

projects.title: West Gate Freeway Upgrade
projects.preview: Structural design support and QA verification of reinforced concrete crash barriers and precast noise walls.
projects.fullText: Quality-critical infrastructure delivery ensuring compliance with VicRoads and AS 5100 requirements under live traffic conditions.
bullets: Supervised shop drawings, on-site concrete pours, and panel installation.
Conducted QA including concrete testing and reinforcement verification.
Achieved zero non-conformances across 100+ structural installations.
Coordinated fabrication and builder interfaces.

projects.title: Mumbai Metro Line 4 & 5
projects.preview: Civil Site Engineer supporting independent verification and QA/QC teams on elevated viaducts and stations.
projects.fullText: Oversight of massive concrete construction and underground tunnel operations in a dense urban environment.
bullets: Performed concrete QA/QC (slump testing, dimensional checks) for foundations.
Conducted Pile Integrity Testing (PIT) and Dynamic Load Testing (DLT).
Monitored tunnel alignment (TBM) and excavation safety.
Supervised installation of bearings and precast bridge elements.
Supported end-to-end delivery of $100M+ industrial and infrastructure projects.
Managed subcontractor procurement (RFQs, tender evaluations).
Administered variations ($8M+), progress claims and EOT submissions.
Updated Primavera P6 schedules reflecting sequencing and delay impacts.

timeline.roleCompany: Structural Project Engineer (Telecom), Indara Digital Infrastructures
bullets: Delivered 150+ telecom infrastructure upgrades (5G network expansion) across metro and remote sites.
Coordinated land access, council approvals and statutory submissions for new and upgraded sites.
Managed civil interfaces for tower foundations and fibre backhaul readiness.
Reviewed fabrication drawings and conducted site inspections to AS/NZS 1170.

bullets: Designed steel framing and reinforced concrete elements to AS 4100, AS 3600 and AS/NZS 1170.
Coordinated fabrication, shop drawings, and builder interfaces.
Conducted site inspections and QA hold-point sign-offs.

timeline.roleCompany: Graduate Civil Engineer, Structcom Consulting Engineers
bullets: Designed stormwater drainage, OSD systems, and site grading layouts.
Coordinated geotechnical investigations, surveys, LPOD, and council approvals.

timeline.roleCompany: Civil Site Engineer, Tata Projects (Mumbai Metro)
bullets: Supported QA/QC teams on elevated viaduct and station construction.
Conducted Pile Integrity Testing (PIT) and Dynamic Load Testing (DLT).
Monitored tunnel alignment (TBM) and installation of precast bridge elements.

achievements.text: Successfully delivered design coordination for 150+ 5G telecom tower upgrades.
Secured land access and planning permits across 20+ municipal councils.
Maintained an absolute zero LTI record across all high-risk Tier-1 environments.
Achieved zero non-conformances on 100+ West Gate Freeway structural installations.
Administered and justified $8M+ in complex contract variations.
